text: Whenever Reliance president Mr. Mukesh Ambani come on stage for a new announcement, people start shouting because they always announced an extraordinary product in the market. Last year, he launched Jio SIM which was the biggest success in the Indian market but now they launched another electronic product in the market https://www.jio4gmobile.com/ Jio Phone which cost only zero rupees for Indians. The https://jio4gmobile.com/buy-jio-phone-online-booking-trick/ Jio Phone Booking is starting from 24th August 2017 on the official website and MyJio App.
